ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pitches" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game where the pitch was thrown */,
  "pitch_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of pitch */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who threw the pitch */,
  "release_speed" REAL /* Speed at which the pitch was released */,
  "release_pos_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the release position */,
  "release_pos_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the release position */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., strike, ball, hit) */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* The inning in which the pitch was thrown */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* The number of outs when the pitch was thrown */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* The number of balls in the current at-bat */,
  "strikes" INTEGER /* The number of strikes in the current at-bat */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* The pitch count for the pitcher in the game */,
  "pitch_result" TEXT /* The result of the pitch (e.g., strike, ball, hit, foul) */,
  "batter_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the batter facing the pitch */,
  "inning_half" TEXT /* The half of the inning (e.g., top, bottom) */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the pitcher throwing the pitch */,
  "pitch_location_x" REAL /* The x-coordinate of the pitch location */,
  "pitch_location_z" REAL /* The z-coordinate of the pitch location */,
  "pitch_spin_rate" REAL /* The spin rate of the pitch */,
  "pitch_spin_direction" TEXT /* The direction of the spin (e.g., clockwise, counterclockwise) */,
  "pitch_velocity" REAL /* The velocity of the pitch at the plate */,
  "pitch_break_x" REAL /* The break of the pitch in the x-direction */,
  "pitch_break_z" REAL /* The break of the pitch in the z-direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_pitch_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_type_id") REFERENCES pitch_types ("pitch_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES pitch_events ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_batter_id FOREIGN KEY ("batter_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the game was played */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* The score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* The score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* The status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, in progress) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the home plate umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* The name of the home plate umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_types" (
  "pitch_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch type */,
  "pitch_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitch type (e.g., CH, CU, FF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pitch type */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* A more common name for the pitch type */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video explaining the pitch type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* The birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college the player attended */,
  "professional_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "current_salary" REAL /* The current salary of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* The date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* The team's mascot */,
  "website" TEXT /* The team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* The team's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "opened_year" INTEGER /* The year the stadium was opened */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* The architectural style of the stadium */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* The type of field (e.g., natural grass, artificial turf) */,
  "roof_type" TEXT /* The type of roof (e.g., open, retractable) */,
  "lighting_type" TEXT /* The type of lighting (e.g., LED, traditional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_events" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitch event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pitch event type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the pitch event */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video explaining the pitch event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* The access level of the role (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced, 3 for admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pitch data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pitch data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_size" REAL /* The size of the data accessed in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "total_pitches" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown */,
  "strike_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of strikes */,
  "ball_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of balls */,
  "hit_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of hits */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned Run Average (ERA) */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus Hits per Innings Pitched (WHIP) */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* The win percentage of the player in the season */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* The number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* The number of walks */,
  "hits_allowed" INTEGER /* The number of hits allowed */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* The number of runs allowed */,
  "home_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* The number of home runs allowed */,
  "quality_starts" INTEGER /* The number of quality starts */,
  "complete_games" INTEGER /* The number of complete games */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* The number of shutouts */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* The number of saves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
